def negative_pytest_parametrize_with_single_test_case():
    rule_id = "pytest_parametrize_with_single_test_case"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "@pytest.mark.parametrize applied with only one parameter set; use a plain test function instead."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
